verses.text: Israel kumpi, Jehoahaz' tapa Jehoash' kum nihna kumin, Judah kumpi, Joash' tapa Amaziah in uk ding kipan hi
Amah in uk ding a kipatin kum sawmnihlenga pha a, Jerusalem-ah amah in kum sawmnihlekua sung uk hi. Ama nu' min Jehoaddin hi a, Jerusalem khuami ahi hi
Topa' mitah amah a manin gamta a, ahi zongin a pu David bang zolo hi. A pa Joash' hihsa na khempeuh hih hi
Mualtunga biaknate koihkhia lo hi. Mite in tuate tungah biakna pia-in paknamtui hal lai uh hi
Kumpi aana kiptakin ama khutsungah a om phetin ama pa ahi kumpipa a that a nasemte amah in that hi

Ahih hangin Topa in a thupiaksa, Moses thukham laibu sungah, “Tate' hangin pate kithatlo ding a, pate' hangin tate zong kithatlo ding hi; ahih hangin mi khempeuh amau' khialhna hangin si ding hi,” ci-in a kigelh bangin amah in mi thatte' tate thatlo hi
Amah in Edom mite tul sawm Ci Kuam-ah thatin Sela khua simin la a, a min dingin Joktheel phuak a, tuni dongin tua min kipsuak hi
Tua ciangin Amaziah in Israel kumpi, Jehu' tapa Jehoahaz, a tapa Jehoash kiangah kamtaite sawlin, “Hong pai in, khatlekhat mai kituahin kisu ni,” ci-in a to hi

Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa Jehoash in Judah kumpi Amaziah kiangah thu puak a, “Lebanon-a om thangling kung khat in Lebanon-a om taamtak khat kiangah mi sawlin, ‘Ka tapa' zi dingin na tanu hong pia in,’ ci hi. Tua ciangin Lebanon gamsa khat in hong nawkin tua thangling tuancil hi

Nangmah in Edom na vatgawp khin a, na lungsim in nang hong liansak hi. Na minthan'na tawh lungkim in la, inn-ah om in; bang hangin nang tukin, Judah tawh nang na tukna dingin buaina piangsak se ding na hi hiam?” a ci hi
Ahih hangin Amaziah in a thu ngailo hi. Tua ahih ciangin Israel kumpipa Jehoash paito a, Judah-te' gam Bethshemesh-ah amah leh Judah kumpipa Amaziah khatlekhat kimaituahin gal kido uh hi
Tua ciangin Israel in Judah zo a, mi khempeuh a inn ciat uhah tai uh hi

Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa Jehoash in Bethshemesh-ah Ahaziah' tapa Joash, a tapa Amaziah ahi Judah kumpipa man hi. Tua ciangin Jerusalem-ah amah hong pai a, Efraim Kongpi panin Kiu Kongpi dong Jerusalem kulh pi zaguk sung susia hi
Tua ciangin amah in kham leh ngun khempeuh, leh Topa' biakinn sung leh kumpi inn vankoihna sungah a om umlebeel khempeuh la-in, mite zong man a, tua ciangin Samaria-ah a ciahkik hi
Tu-in Jehoash in a hih a gamtatna a omlaite, a vangliatna, leh Judah Kumpipa Amaziah tawh a kidona, Israel Kumpite' Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi
Tua ciangin Jehoash si a, Israel kumpite tawh Samaria-ah kivui hi. Tua ciangin ama tangin a tapa Jeroboam Nihna in a uk hi
Israel kumpipa, Jehoahaz' tapa Jehoash a sih khit ciangin Judah kumpipa, Joash' tapa Amaziah kum sawmlenga sung nungta lai hi
Tu-in Amaziah' nasepna a omlaite, Judah Kumpite' Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi
Tua ciangin amaute in Jerusalem-ah amah sawmsim uh a, amah zong Lakhish-ah tai hi. Ahih hangin amaute in ama nung zui-in Lakhish-ah mi sawl uh a, tua lai-ah amah that uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute in sakolte tungah amah hong pua uh hi. David khuapisung Jerusalem-ah a pate tawh amah kivui hi
Tua ciangin Judah mite khempeuh in kum sawmleguk a pha Uzziah la-in a pa Amaziah' tangin kumpi-in a koih uh hi
A pa a sih khit ciangin amah in Elath khua zo kikin lampha a, Judah mite-a' dingin ngahkik hi.
Judah kumpipa, Joash' tapa Amaziah' kum sawmlengana kumin, Israel kumpipa, Jehoash' tapa Jeroboam in Samaria-ah uk ding kipan a, amah in kum sawmlilekhat sung uk hi
Topa' muhna-ah amah a sia gamta hi. Israel a khialhsakna, Nebat' tapa Jeroboam' khialhnate khempeuh panin amah kihemkhia lo hi
Amah in Gathhefer pana kamsangpa, Amittai' tapa, a nasem Jonah' tung tawnin Israel Pasian, Topa' thugen bangin, Hamath lutna panin Arabah Tuipi dong Israel gam a ngahkik hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel-te' thuakna nasia mahmah hi, ci-in Topa in mu hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh sal ahi a, sal a hilo ahi zongin a peng kuamah omlo a, Israel a huh ding kuamah omlo hi
Ahih hangin Israel min a phiatkhiat ding Topa in gen nailo ahih manin Jehoash' tapa Jeroboam' khut tawh amah in amaute honkhia hi

Tu-in Jeroboam' gamtatna a omlaite, a hihte khempeuh, a vangliatna, a galsimna, leh Judah in a na neih ngei Damaskas leh Hamath khuapite Israel-a' dingin a ngahkikna, Israel Kumpite' Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi
Tua ciangin Jeroboam si-in a pate tawh kivui a, ama tangin a tapa Zekhariah in a uk hi.
